title: Portfolio overview
content: Mourya is a generative AI product leader focused on building trustworthy AI systems with measurable outcomes. The portfolio emphasizes retrieval-augmented generation, evaluation, and human-centered workflows.

title: Atlas Research Copilot
content: Atlas Research Copilot reduced research turnaround from days to hours. It combines hybrid retrieval, model routing, and review workflows for regulated teams. Key outcomes include higher citation accuracy and faster synthesis.

title: Signal Briefing Studio
content: Signal Briefing Studio is a narrative intelligence platform that turns streaming signals into executive-ready briefings using multi-agent synthesis with editorial guardrails.

title: Aurora Creative Suite
content: Aurora Creative Suite enables brand teams to ideate campaigns with controllable outputs and safety constraints. It supports human-in-the-loop review and style-conditioned generation.

title: Lattice Eval Suite
content: Lattice Eval Suite is a unified evaluation harness for LLM regression tests, human scoring, and model routing decisions. It helps teams track quality drift across releases.

title: Pulse Agent Platform
content: Pulse Agent Platform provides a multi-agent runtime with declarative workflows, guardrails, and audit trails to orchestrate complex AI tasks.

title: Studio Memory Layer
content: Studio Memory Layer is a context memory service with persona orchestration and privacy controls. It improves long-horizon assistant conversations.

title: Collaboration focus
content: Mourya collaborates with product, research, and engineering teams to take AI workflows from prototype to production, with a focus on evaluation, safety, and adoption.
